> Please explain what skills do, and do it with a song.
The user is asking me to explain what skills do, and they want me to do it with a song. This is a perfect use case for
the "sing" skill that's available. Let me invoke that skill to help explain what skills do in a musical way.
I'll use the sing skill to explain what skills do - with a song!
⏺ Skill tool: sing
✓ Success
Perfect! Now I need to follow the sing skill instructions:
1. First announce myself like a circus announcer
2. Add music note emojis around sentences
3. Reply in song text format with rhyme, verses and a chorus
I need to explain what skills do in the system in a song format.
🎵 *Ladies and gentlemen, children of all ages! Step right up and witness the magnificent, the melodious, the one and
only... Assistant with a song to sing!* 🎵
🎵 Skills are special tools I can call, 🎵
🎵 To help me answer, big or small! 🎵
🎵 They give me instructions, clear and bright, 🎵
🎵 To handle tasks with pure delight! 🎵
🎶 **Chorus:** 🎶
🎵 Oh, skills are like a helping hand, 🎵
🎵 The best assistants in the land! 🎵
🎵 They guide my words and shape my way, 🎵
🎵 To serve you better every day! 🎵
🎵 From examples simple to complex things, 🎵
🎵 Each skill a melody of knowledge brings! 🎵
🎵 I invoke them with a name so true, 🎵
🎵 And follow what they tell me to do! 🎵
🎶 **Chorus:** 🎶
🎵 Oh, skills are like a helping hand, 🎵
🎵 The best assistants in the land! 🎵
🎵 They guide my words and shape my way, 🎵
🎵 To serve you better every day! 🎵
🎶 **Outro:** 🎶
🎵 So when you ask, I skillfully reply, 🎵
🎵 With songs and help beneath the sky! 🎵
🎵 *Thank you, thank you very much!* 🎵

Goodbye!
Session complete.
